headline: The Real Risk Inside Marvell Stock
summary: If you hold Marvell (MRVL) stock, you’ve been on a wild ride. The shares have gained +207% over the past year, even after pulling back from their recent peak. But with that performance comes a new kind of pressure. Management has laid out a vision for growth so ambitious that the stock is now priced for near-flawless execution, leaving very little room for error.

content.summary: If you hold Marvell (MRVL) stock, you’ve been on a wild ride. The shares have gained +207% over the past year, even after pulling back from their recent peak. Management has laid out a vision for growth so ambitious that the stock is now priced for near-flawless execution, leaving very little room for error.

headline: TSMC and AI stocks fall despite upbeat earnings. Here’s what’s worrying investors
summary: Investing.com -- Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (NYSE:TSM) reported a 77% year-on-year surge in Q2 2026 net profit to a record T$706.6 billion ($21.99 billion) on Thursday, blowing past Wall Street's EPS estimate of $3.80 with a print of $4.31, yet the stock was indicated about 4% lower in premarket trading as investors weighed a sharply expanded capital spending plan against near-term margin pressure.

headline: Intel (INTC) Reaches High NA EUV Milestone And Brings YOLO26 To OpenVINO
summary: Intel (NasdaqGS:INTC) and ASML reached a high volume manufacturing milestone using High NA EUV lithography for Intel’s Ultra 3 / 18A node, with yields reported in line with existing platforms. Ultra 3 processors using this process are shipping to customers, targeting smaller, faster, and more efficient chips. Intel also announced a collaboration with Ultralytics to optimize YOLO26 computer vision models for the Intel OpenVINO toolkit. The partnership aims to deliver up to 10x faster and sub...

headline: Why Did Micron Technology Stock Fall 8%?
summary: If you checked on your Micron Technology (MU) holdings on Wednesday, you might have done a double-take. After a strong prior session, the stock returned -8.0% while the broader S&P 500 returned +0.4%. The company hadn't made a misstep. In fact, it's the exact opposite, which makes the story here so compelling.
